title: Application Entry Point
description: Start with main.py, the entry point for the FastAPI application. It initializes the Gemini client, configures CORS middleware, and mounts all major routers including campaign generation, smart posting, and the agentic scraper.

title: Data Models & Contracts
description: The models.py file defines the Pydantic schemas and Enums used throughout the system. These models ensure type safety and consistent data structures for everything from campaign goals to scraped brand identities.

title: Campaign Orchestration
description: The campaign.py module handles the high-level logic for generating marketing campaigns. It orchestrates multiple calls to Gemini to determine visual approaches, font styles, and caption directions based on the campaign goal.

title: Advanced Smart Posting
description: The smartpost.py module manages sophisticated post generation, including carousel arcs and festival-themed content. It uses specialized heuristics to select visual styles and emotional hooks for higher engagement.

title: Scraper Pipeline Orchestrator
description: The scraper_agents/orchestrator.py file is the heart of the agentic scraping system. It manage the execution of various agents (logo, visual, content, etc.) and maintains the global state of the scraping process.

title: Base Agent Architecture
description: All specialized scrapers inherit from the BaseAgent in scraper_agents/agents/base.py. This base class provides common functionality for tracking token usage, managing API clients, and handling errors across the pipeline.

title: Brand Intelligence Agent
description: The BrandIntelligenceAgent is a key specialized agent that uses AI to analyze scraped data and synthesize a cohesive brand identity, including voice, values, and target audience segments.

title: HTML Extraction Helpers
description: The scraper_agents/extractors/html_helpers.py module provides robust tools for parsing complex web pages, extracting metadata, and cleaning content before it's processed by the AI agents.

title: AI Quality & Safety Guards
description: Finally, prompt_guards.py and prompt_enhancer.py ensure that the AI-generated content meets high-quality standards. They provide negative prompts, typography precision rules, and enhancers to refine user inputs into professional prompts.
